guardrails: Keep SBOS-A1-ERP publishable as a public, open-core, brand-neutral distribution.
Do not ship Armosphera, HayHashvapah, or Samvel tenant identifiers in runtime/source files except the documented stable e-invoice protocol URN.
Do not ship key-shaped secrets or tracked env files; operators bring their own deploy-time branding and credentials.
Keep the e-invoice namespace stable for existing mappers; enforce the exception with the static checker.
Keep the checker static and narrow; full lint/typecheck/test remain separate gates.
